name: easiest_5_eval_split
selection_method: Judgmental composite of aggregate pass-rate rank and weak-model-only rank, with weak-model solvability weighted more heavily.

tasks.problem_title: Add iterable collection combinators to true-myth
tasks.rationale: Clear easiest task: rank 1 in both aggregate and weak-model views.

tasks.problem_title: Abort pending body reads on shutdown
tasks.rationale: Very high agreement: aggregate rank 2 and weak-model rank 3.

tasks.problem_title: Add multi-module memory snapshots to wazero
tasks.rationale: Weak-model rank 2 with a strong aggregate rank 11; weak models solve it more often than most aggregate-top tasks.

tasks.problem_title: Add typed blend range access and blend-if compositing
tasks.rationale: Weak-model rank 4 and aggregate rank 9; consistently easy under both signals.

tasks.problem_title: Add JSONPath query APIs to orderedmap and Starlark modules
tasks.rationale: Aggregate rank 7 and weak-model rank 6, solved by more distinct weak models than close alternatives.
